name: svg-diagram-marketplace
description: Production-grade SVG diagram skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: svg-diagram
plugins.description: Hand-written SVG diagrams: sequence, flowchart, structure, ERD, interactive, state machine, timeline. Dark mode, semantic colors, CJK support.
